title: Tim Minchin + The Heritage Orchestra
full_description: Tim Minchin's most ambitious live project, scaling his act up to be performed with the full Heritage Orchestra. A mixture of material including new songs on the subject of prayer and rationality, alongside his best-known work. Filmed at the Royal Albert Hall in April 2011.
ai_summary: Tim Minchin performing his sharp, atheist, comedic songwriting backed by the full Heritage Orchestra — a step change in scale from his solo shows, mixing new material about prayer and rationality with his already-beloved back catalogue.
